summary: Guarded archive vacuum against creating an empty store, and added a --force guard to archive clobber matching archive reset.
reason: Greptile review: VacuumArchive silently created an empty archive.db (making the CLI's os.IsNotExist guard dead code), and the destructive archive clobber ran without the --force confirmation that the structurally-identical archive reset requires.
validated_outcome: GOFLAGS=-mod=readonly go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./..., gofmt -l, and verify_skill.py all passed; new tests mutation-proven (vacuum-on-absent returns error + no file created; clobber-without-force returns ErrUsage + rows survive). Peer-gated (code+test), no Blocker/Major.
